title: QPU Datashard Envelope v1
description: Minimal envelope for QPU datashards used across the VM-Constellation. One object per NDJSON line.

shardId.description: Stable identifier for this shard, e.g., qpu.persona.archivist.v1.

shardKind.description: Logical kind of shard, such as persona-impl, spectral-seed, invariant-bundle, policy-profile.

schemaRef.description: Canonical URI of the primary contract schema implemented by this shard.

repoTier.description: VM-Constellation tier of the producing repository.

repoName.description: Canonical repository name, e.g., Horror.Place or HorrorPlace-Atrocity-Seeds.

safetyTier.description: High-level safety tier for this shard.

intensityBand.description: Normalized intensity band in the range 0–10.

entitlementProfileId.description: Identifier of the entitlement profile that governs this shard.

deadledgerRef.description: Opaque reference to a Dead-Ledger attestation or proof, if any.

functionKind.description: Functional role, e.g., static-contract, bci-swing, telemetry-slice, policy-card.

invariants.description: Numeric invariant values or bands mapped by invariant code.

metrics.description: Metric descriptors mapped by metric code.

bciBinding.description: Optional binding to a derived BCI summary type.

zkp.description: Optional hints about expected proof types for this shard.
